lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

Experience the perfect blend of reliability and value with this wonderful vehicle! It is in good condition, having been well-cared for and kept in great running order. While you'll find some typical signs of use, it drives beautifully and is ready to hit the road for many more miles. A truly solid and dependable choice for its next owner!

This vehicle is being sold in as-is condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The engine currently runs but exhibits a rough idle and several fluid leaks, while the transmission shifts harshly. On the exterior, there is noticeable rust on the wheel arches, several deep scratches, and a few prominent dents. The interior shows heavy wear with torn upholstery and some non-functional electronics, including the air conditioning and rear power windows. This car is best suited for a buyer looking for a major project or a source for parts.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, looking and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, showroom shine and absolutely no scratches, dents, or chips. Inside, the upholstery is pristine, free of any wear, odors, or stains, and all electronic features and climate controls function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a complete service history and no upcoming maintenance needs. It is a rare find for a discerning buyer seeking a vehicle in impeccable, collector-grade condition.
The car is in poor condition. Both the exterior and interior have significant damage and heavy signs of wear. There are multiple mechanical issues that require repair.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body have no visible scratches, dents, or imperfections. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear or staining. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and have been meticulously maintained.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle has been preserved in superlative condition, maintaining its showroom-floor integrity through meticulous stewardship. Every facet, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that exceeds conventional expectations. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of distinguished quality and uncompromising mechanical excellence. Engineered for the discerning driver, it remains a benchmark of its class.

Hey everyone! I’m absolutely in love with this car, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! It is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this thing since day one, and it drives like a dream. You won’t find a cleaner one out there. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love it!

Offered is an uncompromising E46 M3 in concours-grade condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain is meticulously maintained with documented VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement. Power is managed via a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock. The chassis remains factory-stiff with proactive subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep luster with zero panel gap deviations. This is a collector-quality example with optimal compression across all cylinders, ready for the most discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Flawless interior. Mechanically perfect. Low mileage.

Presenting a truly pristine example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-fresh luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the premium leather interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma, with no visible wear on the bolsters, carpets, or touchpoints. Every electronic feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a rigorous adherence to the manufacturer’s service schedule—all original documentation and service stamps are included. With exceptionally low mileage and a spotless history, this car drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot. This is a rare find for the discerning buyer who demands perfection and a turn-key experience.

Presenting an exceptional specimen maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously curated and mechanically superlative, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class, suitable for the most discerning collector. Experience an unrivaled level of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this vehicle in truly impeccable condition. This unit has been maintained to the highest standards, presenting in a showroom-quality state both mechanically and aesthetically. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, offering a peerless driving experience for the discerning professional. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard market, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey everyone! Check out this absolute gem! 🚗 I've taken incredible care of this beauty, and honestly, it looks and feels brand new. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. It's been my pride and joy, but it's time for someone else to enjoy the ride. You seriously have to see it to believe how pristine it is!

Offered is a pristine, collector-grade E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a precision Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. This example boasts a documented dual-VANOS overhaul and proactive rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. The mechanical limited-slip differential and factory-tuned suspension offer razor-sharp turn-in and exceptional chassis feedback. Retaining all original VIN-matched body panels and a factory-fresh interior with zero bolster wear, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated M-division engineering. Turn-key and ready for the most discerning enthusiast.
Showroom condition. Original paint. Garage kept. Full service history included. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, preserved in truly impeccable condition. Presented in a breathtaking Obsidian Black metallic finish, the exterior is flawless, having been professionally ceramic coated and strictly hand-washed to maintain a mirror-like shine. Inside, the Ivory Nappa leather remains supple and free of any creases or bolster wear, still retaining that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic feature, from the premium surround sound system to the panoramic sunroof, operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; it has been exclusively serviced at the original dealership with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records included. It currently sits on a fresh set of high-performance tires and has spent its entire life tucked away in a climate-controlled garage. For the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is an unparalleled opportunity to own a showroom-standard masterpiece.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, offering showroom-quality aesthetics and flawless mechanical performance. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the requirements of the most discerning collector. This is an investment-grade opportunity for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition and curated for the most demanding enthusiast. This unit demonstrates a complete absence of cosmetic or mechanical compromise, reflecting a history of rigorous maintenance and climate-controlled storage. The exterior retains its original luster, while the interior remains indistinguishable from new. For those seeking an uncompromising standard of quality and performance, this offering represents a definitive acquisition.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been my absolute pride and joy, always kept clean and pampered. If you’re looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, you’ve found it. Come take it for a spin, I promise you’ll fall in love!
Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six engine with individual throttle
2022 Sedan. Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents or mechanical issues.

This is a pristine, showroom-quality example that has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like factory finish entirely free of chips, swirls, or imperfections, while the wheels remain untouched by curb rash. Inside, the cabin is in 'time-capsule' condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the interior still carries that new-car scent. Every electronic component and mechanical system functions flawlessly, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history from authorized specialists. Strictly hand-washed and never driven in inclement weather, this vehicle is mechanically beyond reproach and visually indistinguishable from a new model. For the discerning buyer seeking perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle in absolute peak condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This motorcar remains in pristine, showroom-quality state, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. The exterior finish retains its original luster, while the cabin offers an environment indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising caliber and mechanical integrity.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that rivals its original delivery state. This showroom-grade example boasts a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in pristine condition, reflecting a history of fastidious care. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly superior specimen. Rigorously inspected and prepared for its next custodian, it stands as a testament to uncompromising quality and peak performance.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve taken meticulous care of it, and it runs like a dream. You won’t find a cleaner one out there! Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love!
Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in concours-level condition. This specimen features the legendary S54B32 power plant
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Original paint. Interior flawless. Clean title.

This is a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation, presented in a condition that rivals its original showroom debut. The exterior is finished in a deep, lustrous metallic paint that has been meticulously maintained with a professional ceramic coating; there are no rock chips, swirl marks, or door dings to be found. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule, featuring premium leather upholstery that remains supple and free of bolster wear, complemented by a smoke-free and pet-free environment. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history from the authorized dealership. It has been exclusively garage-kept and driven only in fair weather, resulting in an undercarriage as clean as the bodywork. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle that looks, smells, and performs like new.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine showroom condition. This unit has been curated to the highest mechanical and aesthetic standards, exhibiting no discernible wear. An ideal acquisition for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and an impeccable service history.
